active_goal: Repair DEV-014 browser contract AI review no-body POST regression.
last_summary: DEV-014 browser contract AI review regression repaired: no-body POST actions no longer fail parser-level 400 when the browser path has JSON headers; regression test, ci, offline audit and git diff check passed.

npm_ci.summary: lint, typecheck, test, build and smoke:api passed; Vitest reported 12 files / 51 tests.

contract_browser_no_body_post.summary: Regression coverage posts ai-review, second-review and unauthorized ai-review with Content-Type application/json and no payload; success paths return 200 and unauthorized remains non-leaking 404.

browser_dev_server.summary: Sandbox cannot bind 127.0.0.1:3001; npm run dev:web failed with listen EPERM.

intent_debt.goal: Complete DEV-014 online audit and full responsive browser screenshot validation.
intent_debt.reason: Online npm audit requires DNS/network access, and full screenshot validation still requires browser/dev-server access; the contract no-body POST regression itself is covered and repaired locally.
intent_debt.next_step: Run online npm audit and full 1440/1280/960 browser screenshots in a network/browser-capable PR environment.
